description: An Arabic poem transcribed into Judaeo-Arabic and prefaced as al-Baghīḍī's deathbed advice/testament for his son. See these articles for more information about the poet (also known as al-Waʿīẓī): http://www.alriyadh.com/601502 and http://www.alriyadh.com/318049.
description_he: שיר ערבי מועתק לערבית-יהודית, מוצג כצוואת אל-בג'ידי לבנו על ערש דווי. הפייטן ידוע גם כאל-ואעיזי.
